Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Remove dead code from prompt.txt refactor

## Context

The commit `2ee2adac` ("Use shadow branch/filesystem as source of truth for prompt.txt, never transcript") removed prompt extraction from the TurnEnd handler in `lifecycle.go`. This left behind dead code: the `ExtractPrompts` interface method, all 3 agent implementations of it, and several helper functions in `cli/transcript.go` that were only used for prompt/summary extraction from transcripts.

## Dead Code Inventory

### 1. `TranscriptAnalyzer.ExtractPrompts` — interface method + 3 implementations

No production callers remain after `lifecycle.go` stopped calling it.

| File | Lines | What |
|------|-------|------|
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/agent.go:148-149` | Interface method declaration |
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/claudecode/lifecycle.go:74-92` | Claude Code implementation |
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/geminicli/lifecycle.go:70-90` | Gemini CLI implementation |
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/opencode/transcript.go:201-228` | OpenCode implementation |
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/opencode/transcript_test.go:464-491` | `TestExtractPrompts` — tests dead method |

### 2. `geminicli.ExtractLastUserPrompt` + `ExtractLastUserPromptFromTranscript`

Only called from tests within the package. No production callers.

| File | Lines | What |
|------|-------|------|
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/geminicli/transcript.go:154-178` | Both functions |
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/geminicli/transcript_test.go:270-325` | `TestExtractLastUserPrompt` |
| `cmd/entire/cli/agent/geminicli/transcript_test.go:588-604` | `TestExtractLastUserPromptFromTranscript` |

### 3. Dead functions in `cmd/entire/cli/transcript.go`

After removing `ExtractPrompts` from `lifecycle.go`, these functions have no production callers (only tests or other dead functions call them):

| Function | Lines | Why dead |
|----------|-------|----------|
| `PromptResponsePair` (type) | 28-34 | Only used by `ExtractAllPromptResponses` |
